display_name: Amazon Nova Pro 1.0 is a highly capable multimodal foundation model from Amazon Nova, offering a strong balance of accuracy, speed, and cost for processing text, images, and video. Its context window
description:
Amazon Nova Pro 1.0 is a highly capable multimodal foundation model from Amazon Nova, offering a strong balance of accuracy, speed, and cost for processing text, images, and video. Its context window is 300,000 tokens, which enables handling very large inputs (including up to ~30 minutes of video input) in a single request.

Optional parameter:
Latency Optimized Inference to enable faster inference at a higher cost. It is `off` by default.
Note that if enabled, costs may increase. Check the rate card for more information.
